name: Support charge dispute policy example
answer:
Customers may dispute a card charge within 60 days of the transaction.
Customers may dispute a card charge within 7 days of the transaction.
Support automatically reverses every disputed charge before review.

sources.title: Support Charge Dispute Policy
sources.content:
Customers may dispute a card charge within 60 days of the transaction.
Support reviews disputed charges before issuing any reversal.
